pi_items.verified_value: Corresponds to 11:00 AM to 2:00 PM in eQUEST's 1-indexed hourly notation (hour 1=12am-1am, hour 12=11am-12pm, hour 13=12pm-1pm, hour 14=1pm-2pm)
pi_items.source: Analysis of DAY-SCHEDULE-PD format in 4StoreyBuilding.inp showing 24 values with 1-indexed hours; verified with eQUEST documentation references

pi_items.verified_value: 1.0 represents 100% occupancy in FRACTION-type schedules; consistent with eQUEST schedule definitions
pi_items.source: Observed in existing occupancy schedules in 4StoreyBuilding.inp (e.g., '0.9' for 90% occupancy)

pi_items.verified_value: Download exists at https://doe2.com/Download/equest/eQUEST_3-65_Build7175_2018-10-04.zip (122MB). Official documentation references build 7175 dated October 2018.

pi_items.metadata_value: Building energy simulation tool using DOE-2.2 engine
pi_items.verified_value: eQUEST combines DOE-2.2 simulation engine with graphical interface. Free software available at doe2.com
pi_items.source: Official eQUEST documentation and doe2.com website; multiple verified sources

privileged_info_summary: The 4StoreyBuilding.inp project file is a real eQUEST/DOE-2 building energy model existing at equest_env/data/4StoreyBuilding.inp. eQUEST 3-65 Build 7175 from October 2018 is real software available for download. The building model contains 10 zones with designations following the pattern G.[Direction][Number], including zones like G.E12 and G.E17 on the east side. Hour 12, 13, 14 in the schedule system correctly represent 11:00 AM to 2:00 PM in eQUEST's 1-indexed hourly notation. However, the specified target zone 'G.E02' does not exist in the 4StoreyBuilding.inp file; the actual east-side zones are G.E12 and G.E17.
